text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #39)

For the -O3 test with lto and --enable-optimizations use on aarch64,
main [so: 15 as stands] got:

[00:09:31] [01] [00:09:22] Finished   lang/python310 | python310-3.10.16: Success

as well.
